title: Learning Entry Schema
description: Validates a single learning entry's YAML frontmatter block from LEARNINGS.md. Each entry documents a durable, project-applicable insight surfaced by completing a CS/task/plan.

id.description: Unique identifier for the learning entry. Format: LRN- followed by 3 or more digits (e.g., LRN-001, LRN-042, LRN-1234).

date.description: ISO 8601 date when the learning was surfaced (YYYY-MM-DD format).

category.description: Category classifying the type of insight. 'architectural': constraint, invariant, or trade-off discovered. 'operational': procedural pitfall or recipe. 'tooling': tool/library quirk that caused issues. 'process': workflow gap that caused waste. 'anti-pattern': approach tried and shouldn't repeat.

source_cs.description: CS (Change Set) identifier that surfaced this learning. Format: optional SI- prefix, CS followed by digits, optional lowercase letter suffix (e.g., CS01, CS17a, SI-CS02). The prefix SI- is used for Sub Invaders project identifiers.

status.description: Status of the learning. 'open': pending disposition. 'applied': surfaced insight has been incorporated upstream (docs, new CS, etc.). 'obsolete': learning is no longer relevant. 'deferred': intentionally postponed with explicit deferred_until date.

tags.description: Array of categorical tags for cross-referencing and harvest filtering. May be empty. Examples: 'github', 'branch-protection', 'harness-init', 'process', 'architectural'.

claim_area.description: Optional metadata field identifying the area of the codebase or process this learning is relevant to. Drives before-claim prompts during harvest cycles. Examples: 'repo-policy', 'consumer-onboarding', 'docs-schema', 'orchestrator-loop'.

deferred_until.description: ISO 8601 date when a deferred learning should be revisited (YYYY-MM-DD format). REQUIRED if and only if status is 'deferred'.
